title: Code Reviews Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub code review concepts.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is a 'Code Review' used for?
options: To formally review code changes for quality, accuracy, and adherence to project standards before merging

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a code-review-based workflow?
options: Reviewing and providing feedback on code changes from other developers
Recording a commit directly to the main branch
Its only possible for SQL repositories
